items.blinded_text: This market will resolve according to the final "Close[identifying quotation removed]No[identifying quotation removed]Close[identifying quotation removed]1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar. If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket. Please note that this market is about the price according to Entity A Entity B, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Will the price of Asset A be between $76,000 and $78,000 on relative-date-1 ?
